subject.descriptionZh: 力学、电磁学、量子与物理数学。
subject.descriptionJa: 力学、電磁気学、量子論、物理数学。
subject.descriptionEn: Mechanics, electromagnetism, quantum topics, and mathematical physics.

Physics.Mechanics.subject: Physics
Physics.Mechanics.descriptionZh: 经典力学、振动、旋转参考系与连续介质基础。
Physics.Mechanics.descriptionJa: 古典力学、振動、回転座標系、連続体の基礎。
Physics.Mechanics.descriptionEn: Classical mechanics, oscillation, rotating frames, and continuum basics.

Physics.Electromagnetism.subject: Physics
Physics.Electromagnetism.descriptionZh: 电场、磁场、麦克斯韦方程与电磁现象。
Physics.Electromagnetism.descriptionJa: 電場、磁場、マクスウェル方程式、電磁現象。
Physics.Electromagnetism.descriptionEn: Electric fields, magnetic fields, Maxwell equations, and electromagnetic phenomena.

Physics.Quantum-Mechanics.subject: Physics
Physics.Quantum-Mechanics.descriptionZh: 量子态、算符、自旋与量子统计基础。
Physics.Quantum-Mechanics.descriptionJa: 量子状態、演算子、スピン、量子統計の基礎。
Physics.Quantum-Mechanics.descriptionEn: Quantum states, operators, spin, and foundations of quantum statistics.

Physics.Thermodynamics.subject: Physics
Physics.Thermodynamics.descriptionZh: 热力学、统计系综、分布函数与物性基础。
Physics.Thermodynamics.descriptionJa: 熱力学、統計集団、分布関数、物性基礎。
Physics.Thermodynamics.descriptionEn: Thermodynamics, ensembles, distribution functions, and foundations of physical properties.

Physics.Ocean-Physics.subject: Physics
Physics.Ocean-Physics.descriptionZh: 海洋中的波动、流动、传播与物理过程。
Physics.Ocean-Physics.descriptionJa: 海洋における波動、流れ、伝播、物理過程。
Physics.Ocean-Physics.descriptionEn: Waves, flows, propagation, and physical processes in the ocean.
